1→package agent
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-go"
     5→	"github.com/invopop/jsonschema"
     6→)
     7→
     8→func generateSchema[T any]() anthropic.ToolInputSchemaParam {
     9→	reflector := jsonschema.Reflector{
    10→		AllowAdditionalProperties: false,
    11→		DoNotReference:            true,
    12→	}
    13→	var v T
    14→	schema := reflector.Reflect(v)
    15→	return anthropic.ToolInputSchemaParam{
    16→		Properties: schema.Properties,
    17→	}
    18→}
    19→
    20→// toolDef pairs an Anthropic tool definition with a destructive flag for rate limiting.
    21→type toolDef struct {
    22→	Param       anthropic.ToolParam
    23→	Destructive bool
    24→}
    25→
    26→// destructiveTools is the set of tools that modify state.
    27→var destructiveTools = map[string]bool{
    28→	"add_series":                  true,
    29→	"remove_failed":               true,
    30→	"update_series_monitoring":    true,
    31→	"trigger_series_search":       true,

    39→	"update_movie_monitoring":     true,

    42→	"grab_movie_release":          true,

    46→	"update_movie_profile":        true,

    49→	"update_movie_language_profile": true,
    50→	"update_series_language_profile": true,
    51→>>>>>>> 4024952 (feat: add language profile and custom format tools to Sonarr and Radarr)
    52→	"approve_request":             true,
    53→	"decline_request":             true,
    54→	"delete_request":              true,
    55→	"retry_request":               true,
    56→	"notebook_write":              true,
    57→	"notebook_delete":             true,
    58→	"enable_indexer":              true,
    59→	"update_indexer_priority":     true,
    60→	"delete_indexer":              true,
    61→}
    62→
    63→// IsDestructive reports whether the named tool modifies state.
    64→func IsDestructive(name string) bool {
    65→	return destructiveTools[name]
    66→}
    67→
    68→func allToolDefs() []toolDef {
    69→	defs := sonarrToolDefs()
    70→	defs = append(defs, radarrToolDefs()...)
    71→	defs = append(defs, prowlarrToolDefs()...)
    72→	defs = append(defs, overseerrToolDefs()...)
    73→	defs = append(defs, notebookToolDefs()...)
    74→	return defs
    75→}
    76→
    77→func toolDefinitions() []anthropic.ToolUnionParam {
    78→	defs := allToolDefs()
    79→	result := make([]anthropic.ToolUnionParam, len(defs))
    80→	for i, d := range defs {
    81→		p := d.Param
    82→		result[i] = anthropic.ToolUnionParam{OfTool: &p}
    83→	}
    84→	return result
    85→}
